nasb.text: “Let these words sink into your ears; for the Son of Man is going to be delivered into the hands of men.”

esv.text: “Let these words sink into your ears: The Son of Man is about to be delivered into the hands of men.”

cnv.text: “你們要把這些話存在心裡：人子將要被交在人的手裡。”

ccb.text: “你们要牢记人子所说的话，因为祂将要被交到人的手里。”

csbs.text: “你们要把这话存在耳中：人子将要被交在人的手中。”
